metadata.page_title: 13 th Black Crusade Black Legion Army List

special_rules.name: Special Rules
special_rules.text: Certain units have special abilities described in Augmented Summoning (see Augmented Summoning ) and Daemonic Focus (see Daemonic Focus ).

profiles.name: Champion of Chaos
abilities_or_notes: A Champion of Chaos added to a formation that belongs to Khorne, Nurgle or Chaos Undivided has a Daemon Artifact weapon. A Champion of Chaos added to a formation that belongs to Slaanesh or Tzeentch has a Daemon Bolt weapon. A unit with this character may be sacrificed (removed from play without its formation receiving a Blast marker) before rolling for summoning points. This changes its Augmented Summoning from (+2D3) to (+6), and a Greater Daemon must be summoned. Place the Greater Daemon within 10cm of the point where the sacrificed unit was removed.

profiles.name: Daemon Prince
abilities_or_notes: A Daemon Prince may have wings, the unit gains Jump Packs and a move of 30cm, while its armour value is reduced to 4+.

profiles.name: Daemonic Beasts
parse_warnings: Incomplete weapon line in Daemonic Beasts.

profiles.name: Chaos Land Raider
abilities_or_notes: May transport one unit of Chaos Space Marine Terminators or Obliterators, or two infantry units (except Daemon Princes) without Jump Packs or Mounted .

profiles.name: Chaos Rhino
abilities_or_notes: May transport two infantry units (except Chaos Space Marine Terminators, Daemon Princes and Obliterators) without Jump Packs or Mounted .

profiles.name: Banelord Titan
abilities_or_notes: May step over units and pieces of terrain that are lower than the unit's knees and less than 2cm wide. Critical Hit Effect: Move the unit 3D6cm in a random direction. If it moves into impassable terrain or another unit it can't move over it will stop and suffer one point of damage. All units it moves into or over suffer a hit on a roll of 4+.
parse_warnings: Boolean weapon line folded into previous weapon for Banelord Titan.
Boolean weapon line folded into previous weapon for Banelord Titan.

profiles.name: Bloodthirster
abilities_or_notes: Critical Hit Effect: The unit is destroyed, all summoned units within 5cm are destroyed on a roll of 6+.

profiles.name: Deathwheel
abilities_or_notes: Critical Hit Effect: Move the unit 3D6cm in a random direction. If it moves into impassable terrain or a war engine unit it will stop. All units it moves into or over suffer a hit. The unit is destroyed.

profiles.name: Decimator
abilities_or_notes: Critical Hit Effect: Critical Hit Effect: The unit is destroyed. All units within 5cm suffer a hit on a roll of 6+.

profiles.name: Feral Titan
abilities_or_notes: May step over units and pieces of terrain that are lower than the unit's knees and less than 2cm wide. Critical Hit Effect: Move the unit D6cm in a random direction. If it moves into impassable terrain or another unit it can't move over it will stop and suffer one point of damage. All units it moves into or over suffer a hit on a roll of 6+.

profiles.name: Great Unclean One
abilities_or_notes: Critical Hit Effect: The unit is destroyed, all summoned units within 5cm are destroyed on a roll of 6+.

abilities_or_notes: Critical Hit Effect: The unit is destroyed, all summoned units within 5cm are destroyed on a roll of 6+.
parse_warnings: Boolean weapon line folded into previous weapon for Keeper of Secrets.

profiles.name: Lord of Change
abilities_or_notes: Critical Hit Effect: The unit is destroyed, all summoned units within 5cm are destroyed on a roll of 6+.
parse_warnings: Boolean weapon line folded into previous weapon for Lord of Change.

profiles.name: Ravager Titan
abilities_or_notes: May step over units and pieces of terrain that are lower than the unit's knees and less than 2cm wide. Critical Hit Effect: The unit's plasma reactor has been breached. Roll a D6 for each breach on the unit in the end phase of each turn. On a roll of 1 the unit is destroyed and all units within 5cm suffer a hit on a roll of 5+, and on a roll of 4-6 the breach has been repaired. Any breach not repaired causes one point of damage.
parse_warnings: Boolean weapon line folded into previous weapon for Ravager Titan.

profiles.name: Harbinger
abilities_or_notes: Critical Hit Effect: The unit is destroyed.

profiles.name: Despoiler Class Battleship
abilities_or_notes: May transport 40 infantry units or Chaos Dreadnoughts; plus nine Chaos Thunderhawks and enough Dreadclaws to transport any other units being carried.

profiles.name: Devastation Class Cruiser
abilities_or_notes: May transport 20 infantry units or Chaos Dreadnoughts; plus six Chaos Thunderhawks and enough Dreadclaws to transport any other units being carried.

profiles.name: Dreadclaw
abilities_or_notes: May transport one formation of infantry units (except Chaos Space Marine Bikes) and Chaos Dreadnoughts. The Dreadclaw does not scatter 2d6cm after being placed within 15cm of the drop zone co-ordinates recorded at the start of the game (see Planetfall ). Any troops carried in the Dreadclaw must disembark within 5cm of the Dreadclaw or within 5cm of another unit from the same formation that has already landed, so long as all units are placed within 15cm of the Dreadclaw. Dreadclaw models should be removed from the board once the formation they transport has disembarked.

army_notes.name: Using The Army List
army_notes.text:
The following army list allows you to field a Chaos Space Marine army based on Abbadon’s Black Legion. It can also be used as a stand in army list for other Traitor Legions, such as the Death Guard, World Eaters, Night Lords and Iron Warriors.
Black Legion formations come in three types: retinues , elite formations and support formation . Each retinue you include in the army allows you to field any one elite formation and any two support formations. Although you can only take an elite or support formation if you first take a retinue, they are treated as separate independent formations during the battle and do not have to move around together.
In addition, formations may be given up to four upgrades but each upgrade may only be taken once per formation. Which upgrades a formation may be given are listed in the Upgrades column. Upgrades are added to the formation and are not a separate formation. Each upgrade that is taken adds to the cost of the formation, as shown on the upgrade chart.
Black Legion armies may be supported by Chaos Navy and War Engine formations. Up to a third of the points available to the army may be spent on these formations.
